string.text: Artefact container
Sleeping bag
Backpack
A backpack made of durable material able to withstand the most harsh weather conditions.\n \n%c[255,255,255,0]Double-click to place on the ground.
SMS "Barrier"

Special sleeping bag. At first glance, it looks like an ordinary hiking sleeping bag, warm enough to survive a night in the Zone, but with one special feature, namely the ability to survive any cataclysm, be it Emission or Psi-storm.\n \n%c[255,255,255,0]Double-click to place on the ground.
Sleep ($$ACTION_USE$$)
RBS "Espagnolette"

Durable quick-release backpack with multiple pouches and compartments, equipped with quickly detachable straps, allowing you to drop it at any moment.\n \n%c[255,255,255,0]Double-click to place on the ground. Activation is also available through quick slots (move it to any of them and activate it when needed) or through a separate key (you need to assign it in the control options).
Gunsmith kit
A set of tools and oils for basic weapon maintenance. A very useful item, however, quite heavy.\n \n%c[255,255,255,0]Drag onto the item you want to restore.
Sewing kit
A set of sewing tools and materials for caring for uniforms. A very useful item for patching holes and tears in armor.\n \n%c[255,255,255,0]Drag onto the item you want to restore.
Basic tools
A children's toolkit. Unlikely to be suitable for maintenance, but they could be useful in the hands of a thrifty technician.
Advanced tools
A nice set of tools. Apparently, carefully selected by an experienced craftsman "for oneself, dear." Despite the years that have passed, all the tools are well preserved.
Expert tools

A professional set of tools for fine tuning equipment. The inscription on the box states that the set was made in the GDR. What is included in the kit is sufficient for carrying out almost any work on setup and calibration.
Are you sure you would like to repair %s?\n\n%c[255,1,255,1]+%s%
This set cannot be used for repair.
These tools aren't enough to repair this item further.
stash
Personal stash
Quickly dropped player backpack
%s's stash.
Touch my stash and I’ll drag you out from under the ground.
Put it away for a rainy day.
Too lazy to haul it back to the shelter.
Stashed it away, I’ll grab it on the way back.
Won it in cards from some poor bastard.
No problems with loot so far, let it lie here for now.
If this stash gets looted too, I’m getting the hell out of the Zone!
A good man asked me to keep it safe.
Need to shake off a tail, will hide it here for a couple of days.
No space left, I’ll leave it here.
For a rainy day.
In case I have to make a run for it.
So some scumbag won’t rob me.
Let it stay - who knows when it might come in handy.
I hope I’ll come back...
It’s not even mine, but whatever.
That was a good haul. The extra stuff can stay here.
The guys decided to head back light, so they left this here.
Took it from some fool’s stash - now it’s mine!
The Zone’s like that - you never know what it’ll reward you with.
Backpack’s full of loot - I’ll drop the excess here.
You can never have too much good stuff.
Helped some poor fool fight off mutants - got this as a reward.
My granddad taught me to always keep a reserve.
To whoever’s reading this: may you rot.
I’m wounded, can’t carry it all.
Don’t give a damn anymore. Take it if you want.
Collected enough to pay off my debt. Just can’t haul it all at once.
If you’re reading this, then the Zone isn’t on my side.
Someone’s chasing me. Dropping part of my loot. If I shake them off - I’ll come back for it.
No one’s going to look here.
Not the best place for a stash, but I’ve got no other options.
What’s taking him so long? I’ll dump it here while no one’s watching.
Went to take a dump, hope I don’t forget.
Easy come, easy go.
Traded this from one of my buddies.
Got it from a veteran - said he didn’t need it anymore.
Last time I barely escaped from Blind Dogs - from now on, I’ll keep my extras in a stash.
Picked it off a corpse, didn’t feel like using it. Let it stay.
Should be a reliable stash.
My first stash...
Not gold or diamonds - and who needs that crap in the Zone anyway?
Swiped it from a drunk dude - he’d have drunk it all away anyway.
The guys told me to stash this away for the future.
I'm tired of hauling this crap - I'll drop it here.
Some thief's been hanging around the base. I'll hide this gear here for now.
Where the hell is that guy? I'll drop his share here. He'll pick it up later.
You can never have too much equipment.
Stash for emergencies.
My bro's stuff. He said, "Hold it for me - I'll just pull an artifact from the anomaly..."
An old-timer went and blabbed about this stash while we were downing vodka.
Seems like a solid spot - no one will find it.
Stole it from that newbie for shits and giggles. Let him freak out.
Got carried away trying to haul everything at once. My back's killing me. I'll make a temporary stash.
They handed me a decent pile of loot. I can set some aside just in case.
Stole it while everyone slept. I'll leave it here for now - I'll take it back once the dust settles.
As thanks for your help.
The guys left this - I figured you could use it.
Keep it - I don’t need it anymore.
Everything’s useful in the Zone - make use of it.
You helped me - this should help you in return.
The boys made a drop - take whatever you need.
If you pass by, grab what you need.
You really saved my hide, stalker - this is my thanks.
My old stash - take whatever you want.
Thanks for your help - it’s yours now.
The guys left a stash - it’s yours now.
You helped me today - tomorrow this might help you.
The boys hid some extras - you’ll find it useful.
Take it - I’ve got no use for it anymore.
For a good man - with gratitude.
Thanks for helping out - this will come in handy.
I don’t need it anymore, but you’ll put it to good use.
Don’t even remember what’s inside, but it’s all yours.
A good man left this stash - use it well.
Accept this small token of gratitude for your help.
For a decent man - from the heart, for helping out.
From one stalker to another...
I’ll never forget - the stash is yours now.
If you’re nearby, take what’s inside as my thanks.
Left a little something - might help you in a tough spot.
If things get rough - remember this stash.
It’s all yours, brother-stalker - you earned it fair and square.
Not much - but it’s from the heart.
Put this aside long ago - take it as my thanks.
Found it once myself, but never needed it - take it in gratitude.
Thought I’d need it, but the Zone decided otherwise - it’s yours now.
Everything inside is yours - a reward for your help.
Nothing goes to waste in the Zone - take the contents for yourself.
Take it all - and thanks for bailing me out!
An old friend left it - you’ll find it useful.
Leftover from old trips into the Zone - use it well.
One of my old stashes - take whatever you need.
You helped me like a brother - the stash is yours now.
The boys left this for their own, but you’ve earned it.
A favor for a favor...
The stash is yours - a reward for your help.
The guys shared the coordinates - said the stash’s previous owner won’t be needing it anymore...
An extra stash never hurts in the Zone.
Take it as a reward - from the heart!
Keep it - I’ve got no use for this junk anymore.
Everything’s useful in the Zone - just don’t lose it.
You helped out - here’s a little payback, so your effort wasn’t for nothing.
It’s all yours, brother - you earned it fair and square, no question.
If you pass by, grab it - no sense letting good stuff go to waste.
Thought I’d need it, but nope - maybe you’ll find a use for it.
Don’t get caught slacking in the Zone - take it while you’re still breathing!
An old friend stashed it, but they buried him a few days ago - so take it for yourself.
An extra stash never hurts - the Zone favors the cautious.
Everything here was earned with sweat, blood, and curses...
Don’t ask where it came from - just take it and move.
The Zone doesn’t forgive the greedy - take only what you need!
